name: fix: responsive mobile carousel (peek pattern + a11y)

tasks.name: Update carousel.js constants and POSITIONS arrays
tasks.acceptance: node -e "const c = require('fs').readFileSync('assets/js/carousel.js','utf8'); const checks = ['BREAKPOINT_MD','POSITIONS_MOBILE','POSITIONS_TABLET','POSITIONS_DESKTOP','SWIPE_DISTANCE_MIN_PX','SWIPE_VELOCITY_FLICK','SWIPE_DEADZONE_PX']; checks.forEach(k => { if (!c.includes(k)) { console.error('MISSING:', k); process.exit(1); } }); console.log('OK');"

tasks.name: Update carousel.css — heights, mobile image width, touch-action, hide mobile arrows, dots, reduced-motion
tasks.acceptance: node -e "const c = require('fs').readFileSync('assets/css/carousel.css','utf8'); const checks = ['touch-action: pan-y','height: 360px','15rem','carousel-dot','prefers-reduced-motion']; checks.forEach(k => { if (!c.includes(k)) { console.error('MISSING:', k); process.exit(1); } }); if (!/max-width:\s*479px/.test(c)) { console.error('MISSING mobile arrows hide'); process.exit(1); } console.log('OK');"

tasks.name: Add carousel-dots container to src/index.src.html and rebuild
tasks.acceptance: npm run build:html && grep -q 'carousel-dots' index.html && grep -q 'carousel-dots' src/index.src.html && echo OK

tasks.name: Refactor core logic — getViewportMode, getPositions, applyPositions
tasks.acceptance: node -e "const c = require('fs').readFileSync('assets/js/carousel.js','utf8'); ['getViewportMode','getPositions','applyPositions','dataset.centerIndex','dataset.viewportMode'].forEach(k=>{ if(!c.includes(k)){console.error('MISSING:',k);process.exit(1);}}); if(c.includes('getSpreadScale')){console.error('getSpreadScale should be removed');process.exit(1);} console.log('OK');"

tasks.name: Implement swipe handlers — direction lock + distance + velocity flick
tasks.acceptance: node -e "const c = require('fs').readFileSync('assets/js/carousel.js','utf8'); ['touchstart','touchmove','touchend','handleTouchStart','SWIPE_DEADZONE_PX','SWIPE_VELOCITY_FLICK','passive'].forEach(k=>{ if(!c.includes(k)){console.error('MISSING:',k);process.exit(1);}}); if(/touchmove[^}]*preventDefault/.test(c)){console.error('preventDefault should NOT be in touchmove');process.exit(1);} console.log('OK');"

tasks.name: Implement dots builder/updater + resize handler + reduced-motion watcher
tasks.acceptance: node -e "const c = require('fs').readFileSync('assets/js/carousel.js','utf8'); ['buildDots','updateDots','handleResize','prefers-reduced-motion'].forEach(k=>{ if(!c.includes(k)){console.error('MISSING:',k);process.exit(1);}}); if(!/setTimeout[\s\S]{0,300}150/.test(c) && !/clearTimeout/.test(c)){console.error('resize debounce not found');process.exit(1);} console.log('OK');"

tasks.name: Write Playwright tests + regenerate baselines + full verification
tasks.acceptance: npm run build && npx playwright test tests/visual/carousel-mobile.spec.js --update-snapshots && npx playwright test tests/visual/pages.spec.js --project=mobile --update-snapshots && npx playwright test
